query:
SELECT 'users' AS tbl, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM users
UNION ALL SELECT 'arena_accounts', COUNT(*) FROM arena_accounts
UNION ALL SELECT 'arena_sessions', COUNT(*) FROM arena_sessions
UNION ALL SELECT 'matches', COUNT(*) FROM matches
UNION ALL SELECT 'positions', COUNT(*) FROM positions
UNION ALL SELECT 'trades', COUNT(*) FROM trades
UNION ALL SELECT 'chat_messages', COUNT(*) FROM chat_messages
UNION ALL SELECT 'behavior_events', COUNT(*) FROM behavior_events
UNION ALL SELECT 'predictions', COUNT(*) FROM predictions
UNION ALL SELECT 'seasons', COUNT(*) FROM seasons
UNION ALL SELECT 'competitions', COUNT(*) FROM competitions
UNION ALL SELECT 'competition_registrations', COUNT(*) FROM competition_registrations
UNION ALL SELECT 'match_results', COUNT(*) FROM match_results
UNION ALL SELECT 'notifications', COUNT(*) FROM notifications
UNION ALL SELECT 'user_achievements', COUNT(*) FROM user_achievements
UNION ALL SELECT 'institutions', COUNT(*) FROM institutions
UNION ALL SELECT 'user_profiles', COUNT(*) FROM user_profiles;
